name: KLA Corporation
description: KLA Corporation is a leading supplier of process control and yield management solutions for the semiconductor and related nanoelectronics industries. The company's comprehensive portfolio of inspection and metrology technologies, along with related software and services, helps integrated circuit manufacturers achieve higher yields and lower costs throughout the entire fabrication process. By providing advanced data analytics and precision instrumentation, KLA enables the development and production of smaller, faster, and more powerful electronic devices, playing a critical role in the global semiconductor supply chain.

investment_theses.company_type: Process Control & Yield Management for Semiconductors
